meaning: n.生于天蝎座时段(即约自10月24日至11月20日)的人
examples: Objective To observe the influences of PSV (peptide of scorpion venom) and SV (scorpian venom) on platelet aggregation in rabbit.
While much larger crixalis still possesses his scorpian abilities such as the power to burrow into the ground and resurface elsewhere impaling all in his wake.
